'''Willel''' was a leading [[Administrator/Legends|administrator]] in the [[Imperial Corps of Bioengineers/Legends|Imperial Corps of Bioengineers]] in the early days of the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. One of his most accomplished [[Scientist/Legends|scientists]] was the [[Gender/Legends|female]] xenobiologist, [[Dusque Mistflier]]. Like many others, Willel failed to acknowledge Dusque's capabilities, preferring to foster greater attention on his male colleagues.

{{Char-stub}}
